label: namecode - MARATHON.PERSEVERANCE | 65.222
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Mars Marathon by Perseverance. In this recent HiRISE view from the Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter, the little green dot indicated on the surface of the big Red Planet is the Perseverance Mars rover. Recorded on June 13, the Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
